case_title: HANNAN, TIMOTHY J. vs. HALPER, JANICE R. et al

docket_entries.description: TRIAL OFF CALENDAR
COURT TRIAL CONTINUED TO MAR-04-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 06 PER DEPARTMENT AT TRIAL
NO RESPONSE TO NOTICE; EXHIBITS AND DEPOSITIONS ORDERED DESTROYED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF HANNAN, TIMOTHY J.
PHOTOCOPY FOR PUBLIC

JUDGE:DAVID BALLATI,CLERK:ECLAVERIA;RPTR:CLAUDIA GALLAGHER C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. PLFF AND DEFT PRESENT AND BOTH REPRESENTING THEMSELVES. ORAL AND DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCES PRESENTED BY BOTH PARTIES. COURT TRIAL CONTINUED TO FEB. 16, 1996 AT 9:30AM, DEPT. 6, BEFORE JUDGE BALLATI.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HANNAN, TIMOTHY J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HALPER, JANICE R. $13,248.50 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,248.50, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT HALPER, JANICE R.
COURT TRIAL CONTINUED TO FEB-16-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 06 PER DEPARTMENT AT TRIAL
PER DIEM FEES DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF HANNAN, TIMOTHY J.

JUDGE D BALLATI; RPTR S LEE; CLK C CARSWELL CASE CALLED FOR RESUMPTION OF COURT TRIAL BEGUN 16-FEB-96. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT AND BOTH IN PRO PER. REBUTTAL TESTIMONY TAKEN. CLOSING ARGUMENTS HEARD. BOTH PARTIES SUBMITTED. ALL EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED IN THE FILE. PER DIEM FEES FOR PM 1-12-96 AND AM 3-4-96 WERE PAID BY DEFT HALPER BY CHECK FOR $180. RECEIPT#3304P106. PER DIEM FEES FOR AM 3-4-96 WILL BE SENT BY PLTF HANNAN BY MAIL.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HALPER, JANICE R. $5,179.50 PRINCIPAL, $763.25 INTEREST, $664.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,607.25, COSTS PER COST BILL. INTEREST CALCULATED AT 10% PER ANUM FROM 13-OCT-94.
